title: symphoricarpos albus var. mollis
intro: Symphoricarpos albus var. mollis, also known as Snowberry, is a deciduous shrub native to North America, characterized by its white berries and pink to white flowers. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Snowberry are attributed to its high content of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, which can help to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Snowberry can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
